title: helenium ovallense
intro: Helenium ovallense, also known as Oval-leaved Sneezeweed, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helenium ovallense include its ability to reduce fever and relieve respiratory issues, such as the common cold and allergies. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile remedy for various health conditions.
